zh.Wiggenhall, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可維根哈爾 聖 瑪麗 馮 維金
zh.Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可維根哈爾 聖 彼得
zh.lifeSummary: 當Fuko Howard於1115年出生在英國諾福爾可維根哈爾 聖 彼得時，他的父親Robert Hereward45歲，母親Lucy Germund Hereward30歲。他於1139年與Lucy在英國英格蘭諾福爾可維根哈爾 聖 瑪麗 馮 維金結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1140年在他的家鄉享年25歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可維根哈爾 聖 彼得。

zh-hans.Wiggenhall, Norfolk, England: 英国英格兰諾福爾可維根哈爾 聖 瑪麗 馮 維金
zh-hans.Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可維根哈爾 聖 彼得
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fuko Howard于1115年出生在英国諾福爾可維根哈爾 聖 彼得时，他的父亲Robert Hereward45岁，母亲Lucy Germund Hereward30岁。他于1139年与Lucy在英国英格兰諾福爾可維根哈爾 聖 瑪麗 馮 維金结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1140年在他的家乡享年25岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可維根哈爾 聖 彼得。

nameMeanings.name: Howard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Middle English personal names Huward (also Howard) and Heward, from Old French Huard (itself from ancient Germanic Hugihard, hugi- ‘mind, understanding, spirit’ + hard- ‘hardy, bold’). As Hugh appears in Middle English as both How and Hew, this is the definite origin of Heward and a source of Howard. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Hugh .

English: from the Middle English personal name Haward or Howard, usually an Anglicized form of Old Danish Hāwarth (Old Norse Hávarthr, from há ‘high’ + varthr ‘guard, guardian, warden’). Alternation between Haward and Howard may have led to later confusion with Hayward .
English: occasionally a variant of   Ewart   2.

variants.name: Fogarty
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, James Patrick, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fógartaigh ‘son of Fógartach’, a personal name from fógartha ‘proclaimed, banished, outlawed’. It is sometimes Anglicized as Howard .

variants.name: Huggard
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the medieval personal name Hugard, a variant of Huard (see Howard ). This surname is also established in Ireland (Kerry).

variants.name: Hayward
meanings: occupational name from Middle English hayward ‘keeper of the hedges and enclosures’ (Old English hēgweard), a manorial officer in charge of the common fields who protected corn and hay from cattle, theft, or damage, and supervised the harvest.

variants.name: Huard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Adelard, Jacques, Jean-Pierre, Lucien, Marcel, Alcide, Amiee, Armand, Aurele, Clermont, Fernard.
French and Channel Islands (Jersey): from the Old French personal name Huart, either identical in origin with Howard 1 or a pet form of Old French Hue .
History: Jean Huard from Courson-Monteloup in Essonne, France, married Anne-Marie Amiot in Quebec City, QC, in 1670.

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Fuko
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Fuko Howard was born in 1115, in Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, England, his father, Robert Hereward, was 45 and his mother, Lucy Germund Hereward, was 30. He married Lucy in 1139, in Wiggenhall St Mary the Virgin, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1140, in his hometown, at the age of 25, and was buried in Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, England.

fr.Wiggenhall, Norfolk, England: Wiggenhall St Mary the Virgin, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fuko Howard est né en 1115, à Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Hereward, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Lucy Germund Hereward, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Lucy en 1139, à Wiggenhall St Mary the Virgin, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1140, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 25 ans, et a été enterré à Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.Wiggenhall, Norfolk, England: Wiggenhall St Mary the Virgin, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Fuko Howard 1115 in Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Hereward 45 und seine Mutter Lucy Germund Hereward 30. Er hat 1139 in Wiggenhall St Mary the Virgin, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Lucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1140 im Alter von 25 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.Wiggenhall, Norfolk, England: Wiggenhall St Mary the Virgin, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando Fuko Howard è nato il nel 1115 nel Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Robert Hereward, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Lucy Germund Hereward, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Lucy nel 1139, nel Wiggenhall St Mary the Virgin, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1140, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 25 anni, e fu sepolto a Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, England.

ja.Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクウィグジェンハル スト ペター
ja.lifeSummary: Fuko Howardが1115年にイギリスノーフォルクウィグジェンハル スト ペターで生まれた時，父Robert Herewardは45歳，母Lucy Germund Herewardは30歳であった。1139年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウィグジェンハル スト マリー ス バージンでLucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1140年に故郷で25歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクウィグジェンハル スト ペターにて埋葬された。

ko.Wiggenhall, Norfolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 위겐홀 스트 메리 테 버긴
ko.lifeSummary: Fuko Howard(이)가 1115년 영국 노르폴크 위겐홀 스트 피터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Hereward(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy Germund Hereward(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1139년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 위겐홀 스트 메리 테 버긴에서 Lucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1140년 그의 고향에서 25세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 위겐홀 스트 피터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Fuko Howard nasceu em 1115, em Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Hereward, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Lucy Germund Hereward, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucy em 1139, em Wiggenhall St Mary the Virgin, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1140, em sua cidade natal, com 25 anos, e foi sepultado em Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.Wiggenhall, Norfolk, England: вигенолл ст мэри т виргин, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fuko Howard родился в 1115 г. в местности вигенолл ст питир, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Hereward было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy Germund Hereward, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucy в 1139 г. в местности вигенолл ст мэри т виргин, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1140 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 25 лет и был похоронен в местности вигенолл ст питир, норфолк, Англия.

Se casó con Lucy en 1139, en Wiggenhall St Mary the Virgin, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
